description: You are the Master (Captain) of a cargo vessel preparing a restricted visibility emergency drill for your bridge team to simulate dense fog in the Bristol Channel approaches. Configure a fog drill exercise in the 'Portsmouth' scenario at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/m) Portsmouth Approach Custom/ to test COLREGS Rule 19. Update environment.ini with VisibilityRange=0.5, Weather=1.0, Rain=0.0, and StartTime=8.0. Update ownship.ini with InitialSpeed=5.0 and ShipName='MV Caution'. Update othership.ini to include 3 vessels total by adding a 'Cargo' ship approaching from ahead (InitLat offset +0.02, same longitude, heading 170-190, speed 10 knots, 2 legs) and reducing the speeds of the existing two vessels by half. Configure bc5.ini with full_radar=1, arpa_on=1, and radar_range_resolution=256. Create a fog drill safety checklist at /home/ga/Documents/fog_drill_checklist.txt containing at least 10 numbered items addressing Rule 6, Rule 19, radar plotting, sound signals (Rule 35), lookout posting (Rule 5), and engine status. Login: ga / password123.
